question: How many hours of VTO are full-time employees eligible for per year?
answer_paragraph:
Eligibility

Employee Type Hours of VTO per Year
Full-time 40 hours
Part-time (20-29 hours/week) 20 hours
Part-time (less than 20 hours/week) 10 hours

Employees are eligible to use their VTO hours after completing 6 months of service with the company. The VTO hours can be used for any volunteer activity that is approved by the HR department. For example, our employee, Emily Chen, used her VTO hours to volunteer at the local animal shelter in March 2022.

question: What is the average number of hours per VTO request in 2022?
answer_paragraph:
Requesting VTO

Employees must submit a VTO request form to their supervisor at least 2 weeks prior to the volunteer activity. The request form must include the date, time, and location of the volunteer activity, as well as the number of hours to be used. The supervisor will review the request and provide approval or denial within 3 business days. In 2022, we had 50 VTO requests, with an average of 10 hours per request.

question: What is the description of the 'Park Clean-up' volunteer activity?
answer: Participating in a local park clean-up event to improve the environment
answer_paragraph:
Approved Volunteer Activities

The following is a list of approved volunteer activities for VTO:

Activity Description
Animal Shelter Volunteering at a local animal shelter to care for animals
Park Clean-up Participating in a local park clean-up event to improve the environment
Food Bank Volunteering at a local food bank to help distribute food to those in need

question: How many hours of VTO did David Lee use in 2022?
answer_paragraph:
Recording VTO Hours

Employees must record their VTO hours in the company's time-off system within 1 week of completing the volunteer activity. The hours will be tracked and updated in the system, and employees can view their available VTO hours at any time. As of December 31, 2022, our company had a total of 1000 VTO hours available for use in 2023.

Employee Name VTO Hours Available VTO Hours Used
Emily Chen 30 hours 10 hours
David Lee 40 hours 20 hours
Sarah Kim 20 hours 5 hours

question: What is the phone number of the HR department?
answer_paragraph: Our company is committed to supporting the volunteer efforts of our employees and to making a positive impact in our community. We encourage all employees to take advantage of the VTO policy and to get involved in volunteer activities that are meaningful to them. If you have any questions or need more information, please contact the HR department at (555) 123-4567 or [hr@greentech.com](mailto:hr@greentech.com).

question: What is the name of the company that has partnered with the Red Cross to provide disaster relief services?
answer_paragraph: Our company has partnered with several local organizations to provide volunteer opportunities for our employees. For example, we have partnered with the Red Cross to provide disaster relief services. In 2022, our employee, David Lee, used his VTO hours to volunteer with the Red Cross to provide disaster relief services in the aftermath of Hurricane Ian.
